It is not a shipping spec. For current behavior, see: Models Model failover OAuth + profiles ​ Motivation Operators want: Multiple auth profiles per provider (personal vs work). Simple /model selection with predictable fallbacks. Clear separation between text models and image-capable models. ​ Possible direction (high level) Keep model selection simple: provider/model with optional aliases. Let providers have multiple auth profiles, with an explicit order. Use a global fallback list so all sessions fail over consistently. Only override image routing when explicitly configured. ​ Open questions Should profile rotation be per-provider or per-model? How should the UI surface profile selection for a session? What is the safest migration path from legacy config keys? Workspace Memory Research ⌘ I Powered by
